about.title: About CheckReel
about.content:
CheckReel is part of Alwafer Media, specializing in social media management, AI-driven apps, and precision marketing campaigns.

What You Get: Instant media checks, simple correction guidelines, and a free trial for three files.
Why CheckReel Matters: Save time, protect your brand, avoid warnings and bans.
